description: Per-user Ollama app config (~/.ollama/config.json). Best-effort schema: Ollama does not publish a formal spec for this file. The 'integrations' section backs `ollama launch <integration>`, documented at https://docs.ollama.com/integrations/*, and lets you set default models per third-party tool.

models.description: Model name(s) to use when launching this integration

integrations.description: Keyed by integration name (known values include claude, claude-desktop, cline, codex, copilot, droid, hermes, kimi, opencode; new ones are added over time)

title: Ollama app config.json
